parameters.name: $filter
parameters.value: ={{ "mail eq '" + $('Set Email Input').item.json.emailToCheck + "' or userPrincipalName eq '" + $('Set Email Input').item.json.emailToCheck + "' or proxyAddresses/any(a:a eq 'smtp:" + $('Set Email Input').item.json.emailToCheck + "')" }}

parameters.subject: Action Required: M365 License Needed
parameters.html:
=

Hello,

We have a need for $numberOfLicenses additional $licenseName license(s).

Please purchase and assign to the user(s) below.

  • $userOne
  • $userTwo
  • $userThree
